<includeonly><div class="div-col columns column-width" style="{{column-width|{{{colwidth|30em}}}}} <!--
 -->{{#if: {{{gap|}}}
    | {{column-gap|{{{gap}}}}} }}<!--
 -->{{#switch: {{{rules|}}}
    | = <!--empty-->
    | yes = {{column-rule}}
    | {{Column-rule|{{{rules}}}}} }} <!--
 -->{{#ifeq: {{{small|}}}|yes
    | font-size:90%; }} <!--
 -->{{#if: {{{style|}}}
    | {{{style}}} }}"><!--
 -->{{#if: {{{content|}}}
    |{{{content}}}</div>}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
